archetypes.name: Local Delver
archetypes.description: Nearby adventurers and townsfolk bringing modest but practical requests while Monsterhall proves itself.

archetypes.name: Caravan Captain
archetypes.description: Traveling crews with cargo, route problems, and enough coin to pay for reliable monsterfolk support.

archetypes.name: Tower Scholar
archetypes.description: Discreet researchers and sponsors who pay well for specialized staff, rare finds, and careful documentation.
